title: Evidence-Based Decisions
knowledge_note: Islamic jurisprudence (fiqh) uses evidence to reach rulings — check the evidence, decide accordingly. Pattern matching in code does the same.
explanation: A 'check' block tests a value against many patterns. The first matching 'when' block runs. 'otherwise' handles anything not matched.
starter_code:
remember score = 87
check score:
    when 90..100:
        say "Excellent — A"
    when 80..89:
        say "Good — B"
    when 70..79:
        say "Passing — C"
    otherwise:
        say "Keep trying"
worked_example:
remember score = 87
check score:
    when 90..100:
        say "Excellent — A"
    when 80..89:
        say "Good — B"
    when 70..79:
        say "Passing — C"
    otherwise:
        say "Keep trying"
challenge: Change the score and see the result change.
